message:
fix(conformance): enable ext_npm_pi_package_test (remove ignore flag)

With the compat_env_fallback ordering fix (9538122f), all three
CANONICAL_223_FAILURE_TRIO extensions now pass conformance:
npm/aliou-pi-linkup, npm/aliou-pi-synthetic, npm/pi-package-test.
Full report: 0 failures, 100% pass rate.
